warnings: Postgres import and production page/feed/search verification are downstream gates and are not proven by this review artifact.
SysAid is documented as a legitimate software-deployment mechanism abused after the threat actor obtained access; the packet does not claim that SysAid itself was malicious or initially compromised.
evidence: The normalized profile defines the affected delivery boundary and applicable threat vector without treating the Next.js application or D1 replica as publication authority.
The packet preserves explicit unknowns and keeps failed or incomplete downstream publication checks visible rather than silently degrading to fallback data.
